work_request: Prepare post-hearing traffic financial entries, no-assessment exceptions, and payment-plan controls for the afternoon review batch.

control_rows.current_review_note: Collections calendar item. The defendant asked to reinstate a small monthly amount, but the clerk note says the item is on the return-to-court list and needs judicial review before any new plan is entered.

signed_correction_slip.correction_text: Corrected judgment amends unsafe-lane-change text to the applicable speeding citation after the court accepted 58 mph in a posted 45 mph zone.

installment_request.note: The July review did not approve a new installment plan.

installment_request.note: Installments were granted, but no first payment date was stated in court.

installment_request.note: The request came from the stale collections list, not from a new order.

control_rows.bench_minute: Deferred-entry completion was accepted. The court did not impose a new assessment and did not approve a new payment plan.

installment_request.note: The only first-due date in the packet is from the older deferred-entry setup.

control_rows.bench_minute: Driving-while-suspended violation remains the citation violation. The judge completed disposition in the afternoon session and granted installments without stating a first due date.

installment_request.note: The live citation still carries an older due date from a pre-review request.

control_rows.current_review_note: Exception row. The older packet pull put this citation beside Kara Lopez's payment-plan matter, but the live citation identity and dismissal status do not match that plan request. No new assessment or installment order was announced.

installment_request.note: The payment-plan facts in the packet appear copied from an adjacent matter.

control_rows.bench_minute: No-proof-of-insurance citation remains the citation violation. No traffic school or late fee was ordered.

installment_request.note: The older export still marks the citation as not imported.

output_notes.entry_order: Return citation entries ordered by citation_number ascending.
output_notes.candidate_code_handling: For each citation, list candidate import codes that are not entered as final assessment components.
output_notes.decision_flags: Use zero or more controlled flags from the answer template for material source, schedule, and plan-control issues.
